_comment_Jwt: Secret must be provided via the Jwt__Secret env var (>=32 random characters) — the app refuses to start in Production without it. Issuer/Audience/token lifetimes below are safe non-secret defaults, overridable via env vars. DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL/DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD (first-admin bootstrap) are intentionally NOT listed here — they must only ever be set as real environment variables, never committed.
_comment_Smtp_deprecated: Smtp:* is unused since the switch to Resend (Railway blocks outbound SMTP on our plan) — left here only so old env vars set in Railway aren't dangling references. Safe to remove once Railway__Variables no longer sets Smtp__*.
